name: Nessie
description: OpenClaw setup helper and skill guidance for the hosted Nessie MCP server.

apiKey.label: Nessie API key
apiKey.help: Created by openclaw nessie init. The setup command stores this in mcp.servers.nessie.headers.Authorization.

endpoint.label: Nessie MCP endpoint
endpoint.help: Override only for staging or local development.
